channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: 2 passengers test positive for hantavirus as a third shows symptoms after cruise ship evacuation
item.description: A French woman and an American have tested positive for the hantavirus as nations around the world scramble to repatriate passengers from a cruise ship hit by an outbreak and quarantine or isolate them.

item.title: Voter confusion and headaches for election officials follow hasty GOP push to redraw US House seats
Pediatricians group finds kids of all ages need regular recess for physical and mental health
